reviews.review_description: Prank your friends. Never gets old!

reviews.review_title: Good game, not anything complicated, fun
reviews.review_description: Good simple fun, made my cousin jump hard

reviews.review_title: Does the job it sets out to do!
reviews.review_description:
Video playthrough here: https://youtu.be/B1megJNEYyM

I experienced some very effective jump scares whilst just playing this game by myself and knowing that a fright was on the way, imagine the impact if you give the headset to a friend without telling them what's coming! "Oh, try this maze puzzle game" ;)
This was an awesome, quick, Jump scare to my friends and family! It was absolutely hilarious and I would highly recommend!

developer_response.body: I want to see some video of this :)

reviews.review_description: I love the jump scares  its so cool game
